title: plantago lagopus var. eriostachya
intro: Plantago lagopus var. eriostachya, also known as Pratley's plantain, is a variety of the Plantago lagopus plant, belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Pratley's plantain can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
